raw_consumer_statement:
I attempted to cancel my gym membership with XXXX XXXX XXXX multiple times. I sent a cancellation email on XX/XX/XXXX, and called their customer service over XXXX times. Their phone system never connects to a live representative, and the Contact Us page on their website leads to a forbidden error page, making cancellation impossible. 

I previously disputed a charge from this same merchant with American Express in XXXX and won that dispute. Despite this, the merchant charged my card again in XXXX for {$230.00}. I have now requested Amex to place a permanent block on the merchant, as this is a repeat unauthorized charge. 

I believe Amex should not allow further billing from this merchant, and I request a refund for this charge. I have documented all cancellation attempts, emails, and screenshots of the error page.
